use_cases: User feedback collection with dynamic height adjustment as content grows
Comment or message composition that expands automatically with user input
Description fields in forms that adjust height based on content length
Contact forms where users can write varying lengths of text without scrolling
ai_summary: A shadcnspace auto-growing textarea component that dynamically adjusts its height based on content using CSS field-sizing-content. This minimalist input component from 21st.dev provides a clean user experience for feedback forms, comments, and message composition by eliminating the need for manual resize handles or scroll containers.
